description: Comprehensive overhaul of strategy section with NumberInput fix, visual identity (cover images), auto-save, and a community marketplace for sharing/discovering strategies with Reddit-style voting

userStories.title: Create NumberInput Component
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a reusable NumberInput component that correctly handles zero values, empty states, and validation so that all number inputs in the app work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Component uses local string state while editing (prevents controlled input issues)
Syncs with external value only when input is not focused
Zero values are correctly stored as 0, not undefined or null
Empty input stores as null (for optional fields) or shows error (for required)
Allows intermediate typing states: '0.', '-', '.' without validation errors
Validates on blur with toast notification for invalid values
Supports props: value, onChange, min, max, step, precision, required, placeholder, prefix, suffix, disabled
Handles paste with currency symbol stripping ($, comma, etc.)
Matches existing Input component styling (Terminal design)
userStories.notes: Completed - NumberInput component created with local string state, blur validation, min/max/precision support, paste handling, and arrow key increments.

userStories.title: Migrate Risk Config to NumberInput
userStories.description: As a user, I want to be able to set risk parameters to zero so that I can configure my strategy correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 number inputs migrated: fixedSize, riskPercent, kellyFraction, maxRiskValue, dailyLossValue, maxConcurrentPositions, minRRRatio
User can set any field to 0
User can clear optional fields to empty
Validation shows toast on blur for out-of-range values
Verify in browser: can set fixedSize to 0
userStories.notes: Completed - All 7 number inputs migrated to NumberInput with proper min/max/precision and prefix/suffix for dollar/percent types. Zero values now correctly stored.

userStories.title: Migrate Scaling and Trailing Config to NumberInput
userStories.description: As a user, I want consistent number input behavior across all strategy config sections.
acceptanceCriteria: All number inputs use consistent validation and zero handling
userStories.notes: Completed - Migrated 2 number inputs in scaling-config (sizePercent for scale-in and scale-out rules) and 4 number inputs in trailing-config (triggerR, offsetTicks for breakeven; triggerR, value for trail stops). All inputs now use NumberInput with proper min/max/precision/step and suffix for visual indicators.

userStories.title: Replace prompt() with Inline R-Multiple Input
userStories.description: As a user, I want to add target R multiples using an inline input instead of browser prompt() so that the UX is consistent and modern.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove prompt() usage from risk-config.tsx line 348
Add inline NumberInput that appears when 'Add Target' is clicked
Enter key confirms and adds the value
Validate: must be a positive number
userStories.notes: Completed - Replaced prompt() with inline NumberInput. Added state for isAddingTarget and newTargetValue. Input auto-focuses, Enter confirms, Escape cancels, click outside cancels. Validation requires positive number with toast error. Styled with R suffix and confirm/cancel buttons.

userStories.title: Integration Tests for NumberInput
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for the NumberInput component to prevent regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: Test zero value is stored correctly (not null/undefined)
Test empty string returns null for optional fields
Test paste with currency symbols strips them
userStories.notes: Completed - Created tests/unit/number-input.test.ts with 36 unit tests for utility functions. Added vitest.unit.config.ts for running unit tests without database. Tests cover: isValidIntermediateValue, formatValue, roundToPrecision, zero handling, null/undefined handling, and currency stripping. Added test:unit script to package.json.

userStories.title: Audit Existing Utilities for Strategy Redesign
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to audit existing code before implementing the strategy redesign so that we reuse utilities and avoid duplication.
acceptanceCriteria: Review src/hooks/use-image-upload.ts - can reuse for cover images
Review src/hooks/use-debounced-mutation.ts - can reuse for auto-save
userStories.notes: Completed - Audited 5 existing utilities: use-image-upload.ts (reusable for cover images), storage.ts router (has generic upload endpoint), use-debounced-mutation.ts (partial reuse for auto-save), journal-editor.tsx (gold standard save status pattern), editable-field.tsx (local state pattern). Documented findings and recommendations in progress.txt.

userStories.title: Extend Strategy Schema for Visual Identity
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to add cover image fields to the strategies table so that strategies can have distinctive visual appearances.
acceptanceCriteria: Add coverImageUrl (text, nullable) to strategies table in src/server/db/schema.ts
Add coverImageKey (text, nullable) to strategies table for S3 key deletion
Schema changes applied with bun run db:push

userStories.title: Extend Strategy Schema for Marketplace
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to add marketplace-related fields to the strategies table so that strategies can be published publicly.
acceptanceCriteria: Add isPublic (boolean, default false) to strategies table
Add isAnonymous (boolean, default false) to strategies table
Add instruments (text, nullable) - JSON array stored as string
Add categoryTags (text, nullable) - JSON array stored as string
Verify updatedAt exists for conflict detection
Add index on isPublic for marketplace queries
Schema changes applied with bun run db:push

userStories.title: Create Strategy Votes Table
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a database table for strategy votes so that users can upvote/downvote marketplace strategies.
acceptanceCriteria: Create strategyVotes table in src/server/db/schema.ts with id, strategyId, userId, voteType (enum up/down), createdAt, updatedAt
Add ID generator in src/server/db/ids.ts: strategyVote: () => createId('sv')
Schema changes applied with bun run db:push

userStories.title: Create Strategy Downloads Table
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a database table for tracking strategy downloads so that we can show download counts and track attribution.
acceptanceCriteria: Create strategyDownloads table in src/server/db/schema.ts with id, strategyId, userId, copiedStrategyId, createdAt
Schema changes applied with bun run db:push

userStories.title: Add Marketplace Constants
userStories.description: As a developer, I want centralized constants for marketplace categories, instruments, and sort options.
acceptanceCriteria: Add STRATEGY_CATEGORIES with 10 categories (scalping, day_trading, swing_trading, position_trading, news_trading, breakout, mean_reversion, trend_following, range_trading, other)
Add TRADEABLE_INSTRUMENTS grouped by asset class (futures, forex, crypto)
Add image constraints: COVER_IMAGE_ASPECT_RATIO, COVER_IMAGE_MAX_SIZE_MB, COVER_IMAGE_MAX_SIZE_BYTES, COVER_IMAGE_ACCEPTED_TYPES

userStories.title: Add Cover Image Upload Endpoint
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an API endpoint to get a presigned URL for uploading strategy cover images.
acceptanceCriteria: Add getCoverImageUploadUrl mutation to strategies router
Reuse existing S3 client from storage

userStories.title: Add Cover Image Confirmation Endpoint
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an API endpoint to confirm a cover image upload and update the strategy.
acceptanceCriteria: Add confirmCoverImage mutation to strategies router
If strategy already has coverImageKey, delete old S3 object (graceful failure)
Update strategy with new coverImageUrl and coverImageKey

userStories.title: Add Cover Image Deletion Endpoint
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an API endpoint to delete a strategy's cover image.
acceptanceCriteria: Add deleteCoverImage mutation to strategies router
Delete S3 object using coverImageKey (graceful failure - continue if fails)
Set coverImageUrl and coverImageKey to null

userStories.title: Add Strategy Auto-Save Endpoint with Conflict Detection
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an API endpoint for auto-saving strategy changes with optimistic concurrency control.
acceptanceCriteria: Add autosave mutation to strategies router
Input: same as update mutation PLUS clientUpdatedAt: string (ISO timestamp)
If client older: return { success: false, conflict: true, serverVersion }
If equal or newer: proceed with update
On success: return { success: true, savedAt, strategy }
Do NOT invalidate any queries (auto-save should be silent)

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Visual Identity Endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for the cover image and auto-save endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Test getCoverImageUploadUrl returns presigned URL for valid request
Test getCoverImageUploadUrl rejects invalid mime types
Test getCoverImageUploadUrl rejects file size over limit
Test confirmCoverImage updates strategy with image URL
Test autosave saves changes with current timestamp
Test autosave returns conflict when server version is newer

userStories.title: Add Strategy Publish Endpoint
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an API endpoint to publish a strategy to the marketplace.
acceptanceCriteria: Add publish mutation to strategies router
Validate instruments are valid (exist in TRADEABLE_INSTRUMENTS)
Validate categoryTags are valid (exist in STRATEGY_CATEGORIES)
Require at least one instrument and one category
Update strategy: isPublic=true, publishedAt=new Date(), store JSON

userStories.title: Add Strategy Unpublish Endpoint
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an API endpoint to unpublish a strategy from the marketplace.
acceptanceCriteria: Add unpublish mutation to strategies router
Keep instruments, categoryTags, publishedAt intact for easy re-publishing

userStories.title: Add Strategy Vote Endpoint
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an API endpoint to vote on marketplace strategies.
acceptanceCriteria: Add vote mutation to strategies router
Prevent users from voting on their own strategies
Upsert: same type toggles off, different type updates, not exists inserts

userStories.title: Add Strategy Download/Copy Endpoint
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an API endpoint to download/copy a marketplace strategy to my collection.
acceptanceCriteria: Add download mutation to strategies router
Prevent downloading own strategies (error: You already own this strategy)
Check if already downloaded: return existing copy (idempotent)
Copy all content fields, config fields, rules
Copy coverImageUrl (reference same image - don't duplicate in S3)

userStories.title: Add Marketplace List Query with Pagination
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an API endpoint to list marketplace strategies with search, filtering, and cursor pagination.
acceptanceCriteria: Add marketplace.list query to strategies router
Input: search?, instruments[], categories[], sortBy ('votes'|'downloads'|'newest'|'updated'), cursor, limit (default 20, max 50)
Calculate aggregates: upvotes, downvotes, netVotes, downloadCount
Include authorName (user name or 'Anonymous' if isAnonymous)
Sort by selected option with compound cursor (sortValue + id)

userStories.title: Add Marketplace Strategy Detail Query
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an API endpoint to get a single marketplace strategy with full details.
acceptanceCriteria: Only return if isPublic=true (else throw 'Strategy not found')
Include all strategy fields plus computed fields from list query
Include rules array with full rule details
Include sourceStrategy if copy: { id, name, authorName, isPublic }

userStories.title: Add User's Downloaded Strategies Query
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an API endpoint to list strategies I've downloaded from the marketplace.
acceptanceCriteria: Add getDownloaded query to strategies router
Return strategies where sourceStrategyId IS NOT NULL for current user
Include source strategy info: { id, name, authorName, isPublic }

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Marketplace Endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for the marketplace endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Test publish with validation (valid data, invalid instruments/categories, non-owner, requires at least one instrument and category)
Test vote with all behaviors (create, toggle, change, remove, own strategy, private strategy)
Test download with attribution and idempotency
Test marketplace.list with filters and pagination

userStories.title: Create useStrategyAutosave Hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a reusable auto-save hook for strategy editing with conflict resolution.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns: formData, updateField, saveStatus ('idle'|'saving'|'saved'|'error'|'conflict'), isDirty, lastSavedAt, conflictData, resolveConflict
Compare against lastSavedData to prevent unnecessary saves
Handle conflict response: set conflictData, show UI
Cancel pending save when new changes occur (no race conditions)
Clear dirty state on successful save

userStories.title: Add Navigation Blocking for Unsaved Changes
userStories.description: As a user, I want to be warned before leaving a page with unsaved strategy changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Hook accepts: isDirty: boolean, message?: string
Add beforeunload event handler when isDirty is true
Use Next.js router events to intercept soft navigation
Show confirmation dialog using browser confirm()
Clean up event listeners on unmount

userStories.title: Create Save Status Indicator Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the auto-save status so I know if my changes are being saved.
acceptanceCriteria: State saved: 'Saved' with CheckCircleIcon in text-profit, fade out after 2s
State error: 'Save failed' with AlertCircleIcon in text-loss, retry button
State conflict: 'Conflict detected' with AlertTriangleIcon, 'View Changes' button
Terminal design: monospace font, chartreuse checkmark

userStories.title: Create Conflict Resolution Dialog
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see what changed on the server when there's a conflict so I can decide which version to keep.
acceptanceCriteria: Action: 'Use Server Version' - discard local, reload

userStories.title: Create Cover Image Upload Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to upload a cover image for my strategy to give it visual identity.
acceptanceCriteria: Empty state: dashed border, upload icon, 'Add Cover Image' text
File validation: max 5MB, accepted types from constants
Show upload progress bar during upload
Delete button (X icon) in top-right on hover

userStories.title: Create Default Cover Gradient Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want a generated gradient cover when I don't upload an image so my strategy still looks distinctive.
acceptanceCriteria: Generate gradient from strategy color to 30% darker
Display strategy name in large monospace text, centered
Pure component (no side effects, no state)
Verify in browser with different strategy colors

userStories.title: E2E Tests for Cover Image Upload
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests for the cover image upload component.
acceptanceCriteria: Add data-testid attributes: cover-upload-zone, cover-image, cover-delete-button, cover-change-overlay
Test displays default gradient when no image
Test drag-and-drop zone shows hover state
All E2E tests pass (bun run test:e2e)

userStories.title: Create Strategy Hero Banner Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want a hero banner at the top of my strategy detail page showing the cover image.
acceptanceCriteria: Display cover image or default gradient
Strategy name overlaid on bottom-left with text shadow
Edit indicator (pencil icon) on hover when in edit mode

userStories.title: Create Strategy Stats Summary Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see key performance stats for my strategy at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Responsive grid: 2 cols mobile, 5 cols desktop
Total Trades stat with link to filtered trade log
Win Rate stat colored by 50% threshold
Total P&L stat colored by profit/loss
Profit Factor stat colored by 1.0 threshold
Avg R stat colored by positive/negative
Empty state: 'No trades yet - link your first trade'

userStories.title: Redesign Strategy Detail Page Layout
userStories.description: As a user, I want a spacious strategy detail page with better organization.
acceptanceCriteria: Action bar: Back button, Edit toggle, Publish button, More menu (Duplicate, Delete)
Stats summary row below action bar

userStories.title: Redesign Strategy Form with Improved Tabs
userStories.description: As a user, I want improved tabbed navigation in the strategy editor with icons and better spacing.
acceptanceCriteria: Tab Overview (Info icon): Name, description, color, cover image
Tab Strategy (FileText icon): Entry criteria, exit rules
Tab Risk (Shield icon): Risk parameters config
Tab Trailing (TrendingUp icon): Trailing stop config
Tab Checklist (CheckSquare icon): Rule checklist management
Tab bar: horizontal scrollable on mobile
Active tab: chartreuse underline, white text
Inactive tab: muted text, hover shows border
Icons always visible, labels hidden on mobile (tooltip)
Keyboard navigation: Arrow keys move between tabs

userStories.title: Create Strategy Overview Tab Content
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dedicated Overview tab with basic strategy info grouped together.
acceptanceCriteria: Overview tab content in strategy form
Two-column layout on desktop, single column on mobile
Left column: Strategy name input (required, max 100 chars)
Left column: Description textarea (optional, max 500, character count)
Right column: Color picker with preset swatches (10 colors) + custom hex input
Right column: Cover image upload component
Bottom: 'Derived from' link if sourceStrategyId exists
Bottom: 'Published to Marketplace' badge if isPublic

userStories.title: E2E Tests for Strategy Detail Page
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests for the redesigned strategy detail page.
acceptanceCriteria: Add data-testid attributes to all new UI elements
Test page loads with strategy data
Test save status indicator shows correct states
Test navigation prevention when dirty (if possible)
All E2E tests pass (bun run test:e2e)

userStories.title: Create Marketplace Page Layout
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dedicated marketplace page to discover public strategies.
acceptanceCriteria: Prominent search bar (centered, full-width on mobile)
Filter row: Instruments, Categories, Sort dropdowns
Load more button or infinite scroll
URL state sync for filters and search

userStories.title: Create Marketplace Search Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want a search bar to find strategies by name or description.
acceptanceCriteria: Input with search icon on left
Keyboard shortcut: '/' to focus (when not in input)
Terminal design: dark input, chartreuse focus ring

userStories.title: Create Marketplace Filter Components
userStories.description: As a user, I want filter dropdowns to narrow down marketplace strategies.
acceptanceCriteria: Instruments multi-select: grouped by category (Futures, Forex, Crypto)
Instruments: checkbox for each, 'Clear' button, selected count badge
Instruments: popover with ScrollArea for long lists
Categories multi-select: checkbox for each, 'Clear' button, count badge
Sort single-select: radio-style, current selection on trigger
'Clear all filters' button when any filter active
URL sync: filters in URL params

userStories.title: Create Marketplace Strategy Card
userStories.description: As a user, I want marketplace strategy cards that show key info at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Cover image/gradient at top (16:9 cropped to shorter height)
Strategy name: bold, truncate with ellipsis
Author: username or 'Anonymous' with user icon
Tags row: category pills (max 2 + '+N'), instrument pills (max 3 + '+N')
Stats row: upvotes, downvotes, net score, download count
Click card to navigate to detail page
Hover effect: subtle border color change
Terminal design: dark card, chartreuse accents

userStories.title: Create Voting Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to upvote/downvote marketplace strategies to indicate quality.
acceptanceCriteria: Upvote: ArrowBigUp icon, chartreuse when active
Downvote: ArrowBigDown icon, loss red when active
Click inactive vote sets it (removes opposite if exists)
Optimistic updates with rollback on error
Disabled state for own strategies with tooltip
Loading state: spinner while mutation pending
Props: strategyId, upvotes, downvotes, currentUserVote, disabled?, onVoteChange
Compact variant for cards, larger variant for detail page

userStories.title: E2E Tests for Marketplace Page
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests for the marketplace page.
acceptanceCriteria: Add data-testid attributes to marketplace components
Test page loads with strategy cards
Test clicking card navigates to detail
All E2E tests pass (bun run test:e2e)

userStories.title: Create Marketplace Strategy Detail Page
userStories.description: As a user, I want a detailed view of marketplace strategies before downloading.
acceptanceCriteria: Title bar: strategy name, author info, published date
Action bar: Vote buttons (large), Download button (primary CTA)
Stats row: Downloads, Votes, Published date
Tabbed content: Overview, Entry/Exit, Risk Management, Rules
404 page if strategy not found or not public

userStories.title: Create Strategy Download Button Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want a clear download button with feedback when I download a strategy.
acceptanceCriteria: Default state: 'Add to My Strategies' (chartreuse button)
On success: toast 'Strategy added to your collection' with 'View Strategy' link

userStories.title: Create Strategy Publish Dialog
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dialog to publish my strategy to the marketplace with proper metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: Triggered from strategy detail page action bar
Cover image preview with warning if none
Preview section: how it will appear
Form validation: require at least one instrument and category
On success: close dialog, show toast, refresh strategy data

userStories.title: Add Publish/Unpublish Actions to Strategy Detail Page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to publish/unpublish my strategies from the detail page.
acceptanceCriteria: Update strategy detail page action bar
Not published: 'Publish to Marketplace' button opens dialog
Published: 'Published' badge with green dot and date

userStories.title: E2E Tests for Marketplace Detail and Publishing
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests for the marketplace detail page and publishing flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Test detail page loads with strategy content
Test voting works on detail page
Test publish dialog opens and validates
All E2E tests pass (bun run test:e2e)

userStories.title: Add Marketplace to Navigation
userStories.description: As a user, I want marketplace in the main navigation so I can easily access it.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Marketplace' link to main sidebar navigation
Icon: Store or Globe icon (from lucide-react)
Active state styling when on /marketplace routes

userStories.title: Add My Downloads Section to Strategies Page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see downloaded strategies grouped separately in my strategies list.
acceptanceCriteria: 'My Strategies' section for originals (sourceStrategyId IS NULL)
Downloaded section shows 'From [Strategy Name]' with link
Link goes to marketplace detail if still public, else 'Source no longer available'
Empty state: 'No downloaded strategies yet' with 'Browse Marketplace' link

userStories.title: Redesign Strategy Card with Cover Image
userStories.description: As a user, I want strategy cards to display cover images prominently.
acceptanceCriteria: Cover image/gradient at top (16:9 cropped to ~120px height)
Strategy name with color bar accent
Stats row: trade count, win rate, rule count
Hover effect: subtle scale (1.02) and shadow
Actions menu (three dots) in top-right corner of image

userStories.title: E2E Tests for Updated Strategies List
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests for the redesigned strategies list page.
acceptanceCriteria: Add data-testid attributes to list page elements
Test page loads with strategy cards showing cover images
Test 'Downloaded' section displays (when user has downloads)
All E2E tests pass (bun run test:e2e)

userStories.title: Add Optimistic Updates for Voting
userStories.description: As a developer, I want optimistic updates for voting so the UI feels instant.
acceptanceCriteria: Update vote mutation to use tRPC onMutate for optimistic update
Snapshot previous vote state before mutation
Update local cache immediately on vote
On error: roll back to previous state, show toast
Handle rapid clicking: debounce or disable during mutation (300ms cooldown)

userStories.title: Add Marketplace Query Caching
userStories.description: As a developer, I want proper caching for marketplace queries for fast navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Invalidate marketplace cache when user votes
Invalidate marketplace cache when user downloads
Optional: prefetch on hover over strategy cards

userStories.title: Handle Strategy Deletion Edge Cases
userStories.description: As a developer, I want proper handling when a published strategy is deleted.
acceptanceCriteria: Votes and downloads CASCADE DELETE when strategy deleted (via FK)
When viewing downloaded strategy with deleted source: show 'Source no longer available'
Add S3 cleanup to delete mutation: delete coverImageKey if exists

userStories.title: Add Rate Limiting for Votes
userStories.description: As a developer, I want rate limiting on votes to prevent abuse.
acceptanceCriteria: Create rate limiting middleware or use existing pattern
Limit: 30 votes per minute per user
On exceeded: throw error with code TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
Frontend handles: show toast 'Slow down! Try again in a moment.'

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Edge Cases
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for edge cases.
acceptanceCriteria: Test downloading same strategy twice returns same copy (idempotent)
Test unpublishing strategy: downloads remain valid
Test deleting strategy: downloads still work, source shows unavailable
